summary: Backend testing for Partner Journey feature - ALL 17 TESTS PASSED. All /api/partner-journey/* endpoints are working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/partner-journey/progress/{partner_id} - Returns correct progress data with all 5 phases
✅ GET /api/partner-journey/posizionamento/{partner_id} - Returns posizionamento data with partner_name, is_completed, course_structure
✅ GET /api/partner-journey/masterclass/{partner_id} - Returns masterclass data with script_completed, video_uploaded, video_approved flags
✅ GET /api/partner-journey/funnel/{partner_id} - Returns funnel data with is_generated, is_published flags
✅ GET /api/partner-journey/lancio/{partner_id} - Returns launch status with system_checks, all_ready, is_launched
✅ GET /api/partner-journey/videocorso/{partner_id} - Returns videocorso data with lessons_status, is_completed
✅ Data persistence test - Save step and verify retrieval works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Partner journey router correctly implements all 5 phases: posizionamento, masterclass, videocorso, funnel, lancio
All endpoints properly validate partner existence with 404 for invalid partners
Posizionamento save-step validates step_number (1-5) and returns 400 for invalid steps
Progress endpoint correctly calculates current_step based on completion status of each phase
Lancio endpoint includes system_checks for all prerequisites: masterclass_completata, videocorso_completato, funnel_approvato, email_attive
seed_data_creation: Used existing partner_id=1 (Marco Ferretti) from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner journey backend is fully functional. All GET endpoints return proper data structures. POST save-step correctly persists data to partner_posizionamento collection. AI generation endpoints (generate-structure, generate-script, generate funnel) were NOT tested as they require LLM calls. Frontend components (PosizionamentoPage, MasterclassPage, FunnelPage, LancioPage) use correct API endpoints.

verified_features.progress: WORKING - Returns partner progress across all 5 phases with current_step calculation
verified_features.posizionamento_get: WORKING - Returns posizionamento data, is_completed flag, course_structure
verified_features.posizionamento_save_step: WORKING - Saves individual wizard steps (1-5) with validation
verified_features.masterclass_get: WORKING - Returns masterclass data with script/video status flags
verified_features.funnel_get: WORKING - Returns funnel data with is_generated, is_published flags
verified_features.lancio_get: WORKING - Returns launch status with system_checks and all_ready flag
verified_features.videocorso_get: WORKING - Returns videocorso data with lessons_status

endpoints_not_tested: POST /api/partner-journey/posizionamento/save-all - Saves all posizionamento data at once
